note: The chords-db uses shorthand fret notation where fewer characters means only some strings are included, and omitted high strings are muted. For standard open chords (1 frets: 'x320'), the letters map to strings E, D, G... not in order of the scale but string-by-string: 1st letter = fret for 3rd guitar strings (A,D,G/B/e). The format actually maps: 'x' = mute E string, '3' = fret 1 on A string (root), etc.
